Test Case Title: Verify user can login with valid credentials
Test Steps: 1.Open ParaBank;2.Enter username;3.Enter password;4.Click Log In button
Expected Result: User is logged in and Accounts Overview page is displayed

Test Case Title: Verify login fails with invalid password
Test Steps: 1.Open ParaBank;2.Enter valid username;3.Enter invalid password;4.Click Log In button
Expected Result: User remains on login page and error message is displayed

Test Case Title: Verify login fails with empty fields
Test Steps: 1.Open ParaBank;2.Leave username blank;3.Leave password blank;4.Click Log In button
Expected Result: Login is denied and error message is displayed

Test Case Title: Verify new user registration with valid data
Test Steps: 1.Open Register page;2.Fill all mandatory fields;3.Click Register button

Test Case Title: Verify registration fails with missing required fields
Test Steps: 1.Open Register page;2.Leave SSN and confirm password fields empty;3.Click Register button

Test Case Title: Verify account overview displays account balances
Expected Result: List of accounts with balances is displayed

Preconditions: User is logged in with multiple accounts
Test Steps: 1.Login;2.Open Transfer Funds;3.Select from/to accounts;4.Enter amount;5.Click Transfer button
Expected Result: Transfer completes successfully and confirmation message is shown

Test Case Title: Verify transfer fails with zero amount
Expected Result: System prevents transfer and displays validation

Test Case Title: Verify transfer fails with negative amount
Verify bill payment with valid details
Test Steps: 1.Open Bill Pay;2.Enter payee details;3.Enter amount;4.Click Send payment button

Test Case Title: Verify bill payment fails with empty payee name
Test Steps: 1.Open Bill Pay;2.Leave payee name empty;3.Fill remaining fields;4.Click Send payment button

Test Case Title: Verify user can update profile information

Expected Result: User session ends and Home page is displayed

Test Case Title: Verify browser back button does not restore active session after logout
Test Steps: 1.Click Log out button;2.Click browser Back button
Expected Result: Protected pages remain inaccessible and user stays logged out
